scripts.dev:rust: bash -c 'trap "docker stop scylla-node" EXIT INT TERM; cd rust-engine && cargo run -p server'
scripts.start:rust: bash -c 'trap "docker stop scylla-node" EXIT INT TERM; cd rust-engine && cargo run --release -p server'
scripts.build:wasm: cd rust-engine/wasm-math && RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../../src/wasm
